kelsey-brandt.position: centered on the 50-yard stripe, full body, camera low near grass level looking up — hero framing, stadium lights blazing behind her

pose.overall: victorious wide stance, feet planted beyond shoulder width, chest proud, chin up
pose.left_arm: fist planted on her left hip, pom-pom hanging from that grip against the hip
pose.right_arm: fist planted on her right hip, pom-pom hanging from that grip against the hip
pose.hands: exactly two hands, both hers, both planted on her hips in pom-pom grips

kelsey-brandt.expression: calm, earned, dazzling closed-lip smile — the strongest, hottest version of herself, completely at ease

spatial_rules: exactly one person in the image
exactly two hands total, both on her hips
stadium light masts ON: four cool-white light bursts rendered as simple 2D billboard starbursts with gentle uniform bloom — DAZ postwork style, NOT volumetric god-rays
tier-6 build per the attached turnaround in the freshly tailored pro uniform — fitted cleanly, fully covering
empty stadium, no other people anywhere
lighting: dusk; stadium floods as cool-white key from behind-above, warm sunset remnant camera-left, grass speculars subtle
